hook: The goal of a first date is not to prove your full value; it is to test real-life compatibility.
body: When you stop auditioning, you become easier to know and easier to trust.

hook: Trying to optimize every moment can make you seem more invested in outcome control than connection.
body: Let the date reveal reality: pace, humor, attention, and comfort in the same room.

hook: Let the date reveal reality: pace, humor, attention, and comfort in the same room.
body: Notice whether the conversation becomes easier over time rather than grading yourself after every pause.

hook: Notice whether the conversation becomes easier over time rather than grading yourself after every pause.
body: Use the date to observe fit, not to chase a perfect performance score in your own head.
